Description: Support bulk lead import via CSV, Excel, and API.
Split WhatsApp AI Agent and AI Calling Agent into fully separate sections with their own dashboards, settings, analytics, and workflows.
Dedicated dashboard/CRM section storing filtered leads with conversation history, call recordings, transcripts, lead status, and follow-up actions.
Upload a lead list and let the AI Calling Agent automatically call each lead, qualify based on predefined criteria, and save only interested prospects to CRM.
Bulk import leads; auto-initiate AI calls/WhatsApp conversations; qualify leads on predefined conditions; store only qualified leads in CRM; generate reports and analytics for sales team.
Modernize the platform UI — premium look, better layouts, dashboards, visual hierarchy, and overall UX befitting an AI SaaS product.
